Semantic · the boundary metaphor

Load-bearing colours. Lime carries every "inside the boundary" claim; alert magenta carries every "outside." Warn is a third state for partial / contractual coverage, used sparingly. Never decoration — each appearance carries audit meaning.

OK · inside boundary
Inside boundary
#C7F23F · --arda-ok
Pass · approved · "stays in your environment." Same colour as the brand accent — sovereignty is the brand.
Warn · partial cover
Contractual
#F59E0B · --arda-warn
Provider isolation · DPA-only · audit gaps. Used rarely — most claims resolve to a pass or fail.
Risk · outside boundary
Data egress
#FF3366 · --arda-risk
Fail · banned · third-party LLM call · audit failure. The signal the CISO is looking for.
